title: Set WorkingDir to empty, not / for conformance
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

If the WorkingDir is not specified, do not put a slash into it by default.  Instead leave it blank.  This matches Docker behaviour.

comments.body: Test errors hopefully cured by #1101, will most likely need a rebase after it merges.
